LALALA4ED_1.korean: 마왕 오빠가 얘기했던 대로 만들어놨는데... 이걸로 괜찮아?
LALALA4ED_1.english: I made it just the way the Demon King told me… Is this alright?

LALALA4ED_3.english: It was a stretch, but thanks, Ireina.

LALALA4ED_4.korean: 다른 누구도 아닌 엡실론 언니와 마왕 오빠를 위한 일인 걸!
LALALA4ED_4.english: It's not for anyone else but Epsilon and the Demon King!

LALALA4ED_5.english: Trust me, Ireina, and leave it to me!

LALALA4ED_6.english: From here on, it's up to the Demon King!

LALALA4ED_10.korean: - 그날 밤, 나는 엡실론의 방으로 찾아갔다.
LALALA4ED_10.english: I went to Epsilon's room that night.

LALALA4ED_13.english: What's going on? At this hour of the night?

LALALA4ED_14.english: What's the matter? In the middle of a night like this?

LALALA4ED_15.english: I was about to go to sleep…

LALALA4ED_19.english: Wait, wait, like this so suddenly?

LALALA4ED_21.korean: 오히려 환영이라고 해야 하나... 사령관이라면 거부할 이유도 없고…

LALALA4ED_22.korean: 언젠가 이런 날이 올 거라고는 생각했는데 그게… 너무 갑작스러워서…
LALALA4ED_22.english: I don't really dislike it, but…

LALALA4ED_23.korean: 내가 기운이 없다고 해서 이런 방식으로 복돋아주는 건 좀…
LALALA4ED_23.english: I guess I should say I'm actually welcoming… If you're the commander, there's no reason to refuse…

LALALA4ED_24.korean: 아! 그렇다고 싫은 건 절대 아니고…
LALALA4ED_24.english: I thought someday a day like this would come, but it was… too sudden…

LALALA4ED_25.korean: 앗, 그러고 보니 나 오늘 샤워 안했ㅡ
LALALA4ED_25.english: Since I'm feeling low, giving me a boost like this feels a bit…

LALALA4ED_26.english: Ah! That doesn't mean I hate it at all…

LALALA4ED_27.english: Oh, by the way, I didn't shower today—

LALALA4ED_28.english: It's fine, don't worry about it.

LALALA4ED_33.korean: ...응? 접속? 무슨… 접속? 사령관의 물리적… 접속?
LALALA4ED_33.english: Since it's my first time, be gentle…

LALALA4ED_34.korean: 잔다고 하지 않았어? 나는 그게 라이카 안으로 들어간다는 줄 알았는데 아니야?

LALALA4ED_35.english: …huh? Connect? What… connect? The commander's physical… connection?

LALALA4ED_36.korean: 사령관... 나 안 씻었다고 일부러 그러는 거야?
LALALA4ED_36.english: …huh? Connect? What… connect? The commander's physical… connection?

LALALA4ED_39.korean: 잘은 모르겠지만, 사령관도 같이 데려가면 되는 거지?
LALALA4ED_39.english: I'm not entirely sure, but if we bring the commander along, that should be fine, right?

LALALA4ED_40.korean: 그럼 일로 가까이 와서 내 옆에 누워.
LALALA4ED_40.english: Then come closer and lie down next to me.

LALALA4ED_43.korean: 웁… 엡실론? 너무 꽉 안은 거 같은데.
LALALA4ED_43.english: Ugh… Epsilon? I feel like I'm being held too tight.

LALALA4ED_48.korean: 응? 뭔가 평소 접속 로케이션이 다른데?
LALALA4ED_48.english: Huh? Something's different from the usual connection location?

LALALA4ED_52.english: How does it look? I tried to recreate it as faithfully as I could.

LALALA4ED_53.korean: 엡실론이 만들었던 특별한 엔딩과 비슷하면 좋겠는데…
LALALA4ED_53.english: I hope it feels like the special ending Epsilon crafted.

LALALA4ED_54.korean: 이레이나랑 둘이서 뭘 꾸미고 있다는 건 알았지만…
LALALA4ED_54.english: I knew you and Ireina were planning something together, but…

LALALA4ED_55.english: Were you preparing something like this?

LALALA4ED_56.english: And you were manipulating the Leica at will?

LALALA4ED_57.english: Did the commander also prepare this outfit?

LALALA4ED_58.korean: 특별한 엔딩에는 특별한 의상이 있는 게 좋잖아?
LALALA4ED_58.english: Special endings deserve special outfits, don't they?

LALALA4ED_59.korean: 응, 역시 예상대로 잘 어울려. 정말 예뻐, 엡실론.
LALALA4ED_59.english: Yeah, as expected, it suits you perfectly. You look truly beautiful, Epsilon.

LALALA4ED_60.korean: 정말, 그렇게 말해버리면 뭐라 할 수도 없잖아.
LALALA4ED_60.english: If you say it like that, I have nothing left to say.

LALALA4ED_64.korean:
…예쁘지? 월광초라는 이름의 꽃이야.​
특별한 장소에서만 피고, 달이 떠올랐을 때 빛을 낸다는… 그런 게임 설정을 가진 꽃이지.
LALALA4ED_64.english: …Isn’t it pretty? It’s a flower called Moonlight Herb. It blooms only in special places and glows when the moon rises… it’s the kind of flower that fits a game’s setting.

LALALA4ED_65.korean: 그 아이가… 이 꽃이 가득 피어난 장소를 정말 좋아했거든…
LALALA4ED_65.english: That child… really loved this place where the flowers bloomed so fully…

LALALA4ED_66.korean:
솔직히, 이 꽃을 다시 보게 될 줄은 몰랐어.​
둘이서 같이, 게임처럼 꽃이 가득 핀 특별한 장소에 가보자는 약속을… 지킬 수 없게 됐으니까.
LALALA4ED_66.english: Honestly, I never imagined I’d see this flower again. We couldn’t keep our promise to go to a special place full of flowers, just the two of us, like in a game.

LALALA4ED_67.korean:
그 뒤로 이 풍경은, 그냥 저장된 데이터 속에서만 남아 있겠구나, 그렇게 생각했어.​
그런데 이렇게 사령관이… 내 꿈속에 그대로 재현해 줄 거라고는 예상하지 못했네.
LALALA4ED_67.english: After that, I thought this scenery would remain only in the stored data. But I never expected the commander… to recreate it exactly as it was in my dream.

LALALA4ED_68.korean:
…고마워, 잊어버리기엔 너무 아프고, 그렇다고 다시 떠올리기엔 조금 겁나는 장면이었거든.​
사령관이 아니었으면, 아마 평생 그대로 깊은 곳에 묻어 두려고 했을 거야.
LALALA4ED_68.english: …Thank you. It was a scene that was too painful to forget, yet a little scary to recall again. If it weren’t for you, commander, I probably would have buried it deep inside for the rest of my life.

LALALA4ED_69.korean:
덕분에 이렇게 예쁜 순간을 다시 간직할 수 있게 됐으니까...​
앞으로 이 꽃을 보게 되면 떠오르는 사람은, 사령관이었으면 좋겠어.​
그 아이도… 아마 그렇게 바라고 있을 거야.
LALALA4ED_69.english: Because thanks to you, I can cherish such a beautiful moment again… I hope that from now on, the person who comes to mind whenever I see this flower is the commander. That child… probably wishes for that too.

LALALA4ED_70.korean: 그나저나 사령관? 그 게임에서, 이 특별한 장소에 들어오면 무슨 이벤트가 발생하는 지 알아?
LALALA4ED_70.english: By the way, commander? In that game, do you know what event happens when you enter this special place?

LALALA4ED_71.korean:
후후, 힌트는 메인 히로인의 호감도를 최대로 채워야지만 볼 수 있는 이벤트라는 거야.​
아, 참고로 진엔딩을 보기 위한 조건이기도 해~
LALALA4ED_71.english: Hehe, the hint is that this is an event you can only see if you max out the main heroine’s affection level. Oh, and just so you know, it’s also a condition for seeing the true ending.

LALALA4ED_72.korean:
자, 조건은 전부 달성돼있으니까… 이제 남은 건 하나뿐이야.​
이 장면의 이어지는 선택지는… 사령관이 직접 골라 줄래?
LALALA4ED_72.english: Now that all the conditions have been met… there’s only one left. As for the choice that follows this scene… commander, would you like to pick it yourself?

LALALA4ED_73.korean: 앞으로는 같이 볼 사람이 없다는 그런 슬픈 말은 하지 마.
LALALA4ED_73.english: Don’t say such sad things about having no one to watch with in the future.

LALALA4ED_74.korean: 이제부터는 내가 끝까지 엡실론과 함께 모든 걸 봐줄 테니까.
LALALA4ED_74.english: From now on, I will look after everything with Epsilon until the very end.
